name: Kimi K2.5 / K2 (1T)
description: ~1.06T total (32B activated); HF safetensors.total=1058.6B. K2/K2.5 reuse the DeepSeek-V3 text architecture (MLA + MoE, DeepseekV3ForCausalLM). MLA: kv_lora_rank=512, qk_rope_head_dim=64. MoE: n_routed_experts=384, moe_intermediate_size=2048, first_k_dense_replace=1 -> 60 MoE layers. Source: HF moonshotai/Kimi-K2-Instruct config.json.
